text:
There once was an old cat named Max. Max loved to sit by the window and watch the world go by. One day, a bird flew into the window and broke its wing. The cat didn't mind. In fact, Max decided bird-friendly decorations would go great on his windowsill.

Max's new friends loved visiting. They brought treats for the cat. It would sleep among the butterflies that loved hanging out near the decorations. Sometimes Max would just sleep all day long.

One day, a snake came along looking for something to eat. It spotted the cat lounging. The snake thought maybe the cat could help it find a mouse or something tasty.

The cat just stretched out lazily. "Oh, dear," said Max. "You're quite a sight."

The snake blinked solemnly. "You're quite cute."

Max just smiled and flopped his tail.

After a while, they stopped staring and just talked. The snake seemed really smart. Max listened.
